description: Fitting a scaler, encoder, or imputer on the full dataset before splitting, leaking test statistics into training.
body: Failure mode: normalization or encoding parameters are computed over all rows and then the data is split, so the model implicitly sees test-set statistics and the offline metric is optimistic. Detection signals: a scaler/encoder fit appears before the train_test_split call; validation looks great but production underperforms; metric drops sharply under a strict re-split. Do not fit any transform on data outside the training fold. Safer fallback: split first, fit transforms on train, persist and reuse them on validation/test inside a pipeline, then re-run the experiment.
